title: Live/Dead qPCR of B. pertussis IS481
author: Iain MacArthur
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bc5niy5e
materials: Briefly spin tube to recover condensation.
Outliers of triplicate samples should be ignored (omit).

steps.title: Pellet fresh samples by centrifuging at...
steps.instruction: Pellet fresh samples by centrifuging at 2,000 x g for 10 minutes and resuspend in 1.2 ml of PBS.

steps.title: Transfer 200µl of resuspended sample into...
steps.instruction: Transfer 200µl of resuspended sample into two clear microfuge tubes (continue with 1 sample to Step #3 and 1 sample skip to Step #4).

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.5µl of PMA to one of the 200µl of samples from Step #2.

steps.title: Incubate microfuge tubes in the dark...
steps.instruction: Incubate microfuge tubes in the dark for 10 min at room temperature. Cover samples with aluminium foil and incubate on a rocker.

steps.title: Expose samples to light using the...
steps.instruction: Expose samples to light using the PMA-Lite™ LED Photolysis Device for 5 min.

steps.title: Add 20µl of QIAGEN Protease and...
steps.instruction: Add 20µl of QIAGEN Protease and 4 µl of RNase A.

steps.title: Add 200µl of Buffer AL and vortex for 15 s
steps.instruction: Add 200µl of Buffer AL and vortex for 15 s.

steps.title: Incubate at 56ºC for 10 min
steps.instruction: Incubate at 56ºC for 10 min.

steps.title: Add 200µl of ethanol (96-100%), vortex and spin briefly
steps.instruction: Add 200µl of ethanol (96-100%), vortex and spin briefly.

steps.title: Add to spin column and centrifuge...
steps.instruction: Add to spin column and centrifuge for 1 min at 6000xg.

steps.title: Transfer to a new collection tube
steps.instruction: Transfer to a new collection tube.

steps.title: Add 500µl AW1 buffer and spin...
steps.instruction: Add 500µl AW1 buffer and spin for 1 min at 6000xg.

steps.title: Transfer to a new collection tube
steps.instruction: Transfer to a new collection tube.

steps.title: Add 500µl AW2 buffer and spin...
steps.instruction: Add 500µl AW2 buffer and spin for 3 min at 17000xg

steps.title: Transfer to a 2ml microfuge tube
steps.instruction: Transfer to a 2ml microfuge tube.

steps.title: Spin at max speed for 1 min
steps.instruction: Spin at max speed for 1 min.

steps.title: Transfer to a 1
steps.instruction: Transfer to a 1.5ml microfuge tube.

steps.title: Add 200µl of Buffer AE and...
steps.instruction: Add 200µl of Buffer AE and incubate at room temperature for 1 min.

steps.title: Elute by centrifuging for 1 min at 6000xg
steps.instruction: Elute by centrifuging for 1 min at 6000xg.

steps.title: Dilute stock primers (50µM) 9 in...
steps.instruction: Dilute stock primers (50µM) 9 in 50µl, to give a reaction concentration of 900nm.

steps.title: Dilute stock probe (50µM) 3 in...
steps.instruction: Dilute stock probe (50µM) 3 in 100µl, to give a reaction concentration of 150nm.

steps.title: Prepare Mastermix as follows
steps.instruction: Prepare Mastermix as follows: %s %s

steps.title: Add 16µl of master mix per well
steps.instruction: Add 16µl of master mix per well.

steps.title: Serial dilute 9 times, 5:50 positive control DNA (25ng/ul)
steps.instruction: Serial dilute 9 times, 5:50 positive control DNA (25ng/ul).

steps.title: Use dilutions 3-9 for 1000, 100, 10, 1, 0
Load in triplicate 4µl of DNA...
steps.instruction: Load in triplicate 4µl of DNA for each control dilution, unknown and water samples.

steps.title: Cover plate with film and spin...
steps.instruction: Cover plate with film and spin for 1 min at 1000xg

steps.title: Set up qPCR program as follows
steps.instruction: Set up qPCR program as follows: %s %s

steps.title: Run analysis on data using StepOnePlus™ Software v2
steps.instruction: Run analysis on data using StepOnePlus™ Software v2.3.

steps.title: Confirm standard curve has an r 2 >0
steps.instruction: Confirm standard curve has an r 2 >0.95.

steps.title: Convert pg of DNA to copy number
steps.instruction: Convert pg of DNA to copy number: B. pertussis /sample=(50x(mass of template in pg)x6.022x10 23 )/length of genome in bp*1x10 12 x650).

steps.title: Untreated sample (no PMA), represents total B
steps.instruction: Untreated sample (no PMA), represents total B. pertussis in the sample.

steps.title: PMA treated sample gives number of live B
steps.instruction: PMA treated sample gives number of live B. pertussis in the sample.

steps.title: The number of dead can be...
steps.instruction: The number of dead can be determined from the difference between untreated and treated.
